sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Structure Therapeutics Announces Closing of Upsized $747.5 Million Public Offering of ADSs and Pre-Funded Warrants and Full Exercise of the Underwriters’ Option to Purchase Additional ADSs
feed.summary: Structure Therapeutics Inc. announced the closing of an upsized public offering, raising approximately $747.5 million from the sale of American depositary shares (ADSs) and pre-funded warrants. The offering included the full exercise of the underwriters' option to purchase additional ADSs. This significant capital infusion will support the company's work in developing novel oral small molecule therapeutics.

feed.title: Exact Sciences, the NSABP Foundation, and the German Breast Group Present Results for the Oncodetect® MRD Test in Early Triple-Negative Breast Cancer at SABCS
feed.summary: Exact Sciences, in collaboration with the NSABP Foundation and the German Breast Group, announced positive clinical study results for its Oncodetect® molecular residual disease (MRD) test in early triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC). The study, presented at SABCS, showed that the Oncodetect test powerfully predicts distant recurrence after surgery in TNBC patients. The data highlights the test's potential to guide post-surgical treatment decisions and identify high-risk patients.

feed.title: Datavault AI Inc. (NASDAQ: DVLT) Announces a Distribution
feed.summary: Datavault AI Inc. has announced December 24, 2025, as the distribution date for its Dream Bowl 2026 Meme Coin tokens to eligible record equity holders and Scilex Holding Company common stock holders. This initiative includes instructions for wallet setup and token access, with trading expected to commence around January 11, 2026, on Datavault AI’s proprietary Information Data Exchange. The Meme Coin is a digital collectible for personal, non-commercial use related to the Dream Bowl XIV event, not intended as an investment or financial product.

feed.title: Invesco Global Core Equity Fund Q3 2025 Commentary (Mutual Fund:AWSAX)
feed.summary: Global equities saw positive returns in Q3 2025, largely driven by AI-related enthusiasm, central bank rate cuts, and strong corporate earnings. The Invesco Global Core Equity Fund underperformed its benchmark due to holdings in information technology and financials, despite focusing on competitively advantaged businesses. The fund added new positions in Coca-Cola Europacific Partners, Contemporary Amperex Technology, and WEC Energy.

feed.title: National Beverage misses Q2 estimates as consumer spending slows By Investing.com
feed.summary: National Beverage Corp (NASDAQ:FIZZ) reported Q2 earnings and revenue that missed analyst estimates, attributed to dampened consumer spending due to inflation and other economic factors. Despite a slight decline in revenue, the company saw an increase in operating income and basic earnings per share, and plans to introduce a new LaCroix flavor in early 2026. Shares fell 0.8% in after-hours trading.

feed.title: Rivian to Launch Hands-Free Semi-Autonomous Driving Subscription, AI Assistant
feed.summary: Rivian is introducing "Autonomy+", a new hands-free semi-autonomous driving subscription service available for $50 monthly or a $2,500 one-time fee, expanding its self-driving tech to over 3.5 million miles of North American roads. Additionally, the EV automaker will release an AI assistant called Rivian Assistant, featuring voice command capabilities and offline functionality in the upcoming R2 model. These new technologies will leverage a sophisticated lidar/radar suite for enhanced driving assistance.

feed.title: p Vital Farms (VITL) Is Up 7.9% After Broad S&P Index Inclusion Boosts Investor Visibility
feed.summary: p Vital Farms (VITL) saw its stock rise by 7.9% following its inclusion in several S&P indices, including the S&P SmallCap 600. This move is expected to increase the company's visibility among institutional investors and enhance liquidity. The article emphasizes that while the inclusion is positive for short-term sentiment, the company's core investment narrative still hinges on its ability to manage capital expenditure and meet demand for its premium pasture-raised products.

feed.title: Why DigitalOcean (DOCN) Shares Are Falling Today
feed.summary: DigitalOcean (DOCN) shares dropped 4.8% after Oracle's disappointing earnings report sparked fears about high AI spending and an "AI bubble," leading to a broader tech sector sell-off. This decline was not due to company-specific news but a wider market reaction to concerns about the massive costs and uncertain revenue generation from AI investments. Despite today's fall, DigitalOcean has been highly volatile, previously gaining on renewed AI enthusiasm, and is up 41.1% year-to-date, trading near its 52-week high.

feed.title: Fidelis Insurance (NYSE:FIHL) Valuation Check After Q3 Earnings, Analyst Revisions and Institutional Investor Exit
feed.summary: Fidelis Insurance Holdings (FIHL) is experiencing shifting investor sentiment after its Q3 update, with mixed analyst targets and an institutional exit. Despite trading below analyst targets and at a discount to intrinsic value, the company's valuation is seen as modestly underpriced, with a fair value near $20.67 according to a popular narrative based on strong fundamentals and sector advancements. However, persistent pricing pressure and outsized catastrophe losses pose risks to this positive outlook.

feed.title: Guidewire Olos Release Powers Intelligent Pricing, Drives Faster Rate Changes, and Enhances Workers’ Compensation Performance - 투데이안
feed.summary: Guidewire has launched Olos, its latest release, to help P&C insurers modernize pricing, accelerate rate changes, optimize underwriting, and improve workers' compensation performance. Key features include PricingCenter for unified pricing and rating, Underwriting Assistant for automated underwriting decisions, and enhanced workers' compensation capabilities with predictive analytics. The release aims to deliver greater intelligence and agility to insurers, improving policyholder experience.

feed.title: NiSource expands credit facility by $650 million
feed.summary: NiSource (NI) has expanded its credit facility by $650 million, bringing the total to $2.45 billion. This expansion aims to enhance the company's financial flexibility and support its ongoing operations and strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Farmer Brothers Amends Executive Bonus Agreements
feed.summary: Farmer Bros. Co. (FARM) amended executive bonus agreements on December 8, 2025, for its CEO, CFO, and VP. The changes adjust the timing of bonuses and performance-based stock units, aligning executive incentives with specific performance milestones. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates FARM as Neutral due to significant financial and operational challenges, citing low financial performance and valuation, and a bearish technical trend.

feed.title: A Look at L3Harris Technologies’ Valuation After Its Largest Recent GMLRS Propulsion Contract Win
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) recently secured a GMLRS propulsion contract worth up to $200 million, utilizing its new Camden facility. Despite a strong 40% year-to-date share price return and being undervalued by 13.3% according to Simply Wall St's narrative, the company is trading below analyst targets and has a lower P/E than many defense peers. The article suggests L3Harris is an overlooked value, with upside potential dependent on smooth execution and stable defense budgets.

feed.title: Assessing American Express (AXP) Valuation After a Strong Year-to-Date Share Price Rally
feed.summary: American Express (AXP) has seen a significant share price rally of 30% year-to-date, with the stock currently trading at $384.89. Despite strong revenue and earnings growth, the company is considered overvalued by some narratives, with a fair value estimate of $351.87 and a P/E ratio higher than the industry average. This valuation premium reflects its quality but suggests potential downside risk if growth moderates.

feed.title: Arista Networks (ANET): Assessing Valuation After New VESPA and AVA AI Networking Launches
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) has launched new campus and industrial networking tech, including VESPA architecture and upgraded AVA agentic AI, leading investors to reassess its long-term growth potential. Despite a recent volatile period, the company has shown solid share price returns, driven by its AI networking initiatives. While a valuation narrative suggests ANET is 18.1% undervalued with a fair value of $164.08, its P/E multiple appears high compared to peers and the US Communications average, raising questions about whether its growth can sustain this premium.

feed.title: What Align Technology (ALGN)'s Asia-Pacific Invisalign Mandibular Advancement Rollout Means For Shareholders
feed.summary: Align Technology (ALGN) has launched its Invisalign System with mandibular advancement in Thailand, extending its reach across key Asia-Pacific markets. This product aims to correct Class II skeletal and dental issues, broadening treatment options and potentially boosting Align Technology's long-term growth by deepening dentist adoption through integrated digital platforms. While the rollout enhances Align's growth story, the near-term financial picture is still influenced by demand and pricing pressures, especially with increasing exposure to lower-priced emerging markets.

feed.title: S&P Global’s Google Cloud AI Data Tie-Up Could Be A Game Changer For S&P Global (SPGI)
feed.summary: S&P Global has partnered with Google Cloud to integrate its data on BigQuery, enhance AI offerings, and automate workflows, aiming to embed its intelligence deeper into clients' AI-driven decisions. This collaboration, along with existing AWS integrations, targets improved data distribution and agentic AI as key catalysts for S&P Global (SPGI). The market's reaction however is still muted, suggesting a cautious outlook on whether these moves will be transformative or merely incremental for key investment metrics and the company's valuation.

feed.title: Slower Premium Growth but Strong Margins in Q3 2025 Could Be A Game Changer For Arch Capital Group (ACGL)
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group (ACGL) reported mixed Q3 2025 results, with a revenue decline and written premium growth below expectations due to slower markets. Despite this, the company maintained strong underwriting margins, growing net investment income, and solid return on equity. The investment narrative for ACGL hinges on its ability to sustain these strong margins and disciplined underwriting to offset softer premium growth in mortgage and reinsurance.

feed.title: Does Realty Income’s 133rd Dividend Raise Signal Durable Cash Flows or Limited Reinvestment Options for O?
feed.summary: Realty Income recently declared its 133rd dividend increase, raising its monthly payout to US$0.2700 per share. This small raise reinforces the company's "Monthly Dividend Company" reputation and management's confidence in recurring cash flows, despite increasing reliance on international expansion and newer asset types. The article also highlights varying fair value estimates among Simply Wall St Community members, ranging from US$56 to US$97 per share.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP): Assessing Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) has seen its stock price climb by about 10% in the last month, suggesting a potential shift in investor sentiment despite a negative year-to-date return. The company is considered undervalued with a fair value of $34.73 against a current price of $29.47, driven by expected revenue growth from GHOST Energy integration and strategic pricing adjustments. However, risks such as weakness in U.S. Coffee and potential margin pressures from tariffs could impact this optimistic valuation.

feed.title: Cal Water receives regulatory approval to acquire Palm Mutual
feed.summary: California Water Service (Cal Water) has received approval from the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) to acquire Palm Mutual Water Company. Palm Mutual, serving 63 residential customers, is located near Cal Water’s Northeast Bakersfield Treatment Plant and currently receives water from Cal Water. The acquisition is expected to close in the first quarter of 2026, with Cal Water planning to integrate Palm Mutual's customers into its Bakersfield District and upgrade the system's infrastructure.

feed.title: Heico Corporation (HEI) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Heico Corporation (HEI) is projected to report a year-over-year increase in earnings and higher revenues for the quarter ended October 2025. While analysts have slightly revised their EPS estimates higher, the company's Zacks Earnings ESP of -1.30% combined with a Zacks Rank #3 makes it difficult to definitively predict an earnings surprise. Investors should consider these factors along with other market dynamics ahead of the December 18 earnings release.

feed.title: Insider Sell: D Bidzos Sells 9,000 Shares of VeriSign Inc (VRSN)
feed.summary: D Bidzos, Executive Chairman, President, and CEO of VeriSign Inc, sold 9,000 shares of the company on December 11, 2025. This transaction reduces his total holdings to 430,099.1378 shares. Over the past year, insiders have sold 39 times and bought 6 times, with VeriSign Inc stock currently considered fairly valued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Down 5.3% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why CenterPoint (CNP) Looks Ripe for a Turnaround
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) has experienced a 5.3% decline over the past four weeks, placing the stock in oversold territory according to its Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 28.96. This technical indicator, coupled with a strong consensus among Wall Street analysts for improved earnings and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), suggests CNP is poised for a potential rebound. Investors may find this an opportune time to consider entry for a turnaround play.

feed.title: Katharine Weymouth Purchases Shares of Republic Services Inc
feed.summary: Katharine Weymouth, a Director at Republic Services Inc (RSG), recently purchased 478 shares, increasing her total holdings to 5,740 shares. This transaction occurred on December 9, 2025, when the stock was trading at $209.46. Republic Services Inc is currently considered fairly valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.99.

feed.title: Watkins Advises IRRAS on Acquisition by ClearPoint Neuro
feed.summary: Latham & Watkins LLP represented IRRAS Holdings Inc., a medical device company, in the sale of 100% of its shares to ClearPoint Neuro, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLPT). The transaction involved a mix of cash and ClearPoint common stock shares, along with potential earnout payments based on future net sales. This strategic acquisition aims to expand IRRAS's market presence and commercial capabilities.

feed.title: Enova’s Stock Boom: A Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Enova International Inc. (ENVA) has seen its stock rise by 11.68% due to bullish market sentiments and a new $400M share repurchase program. The company demonstrates strong financial health with $2.66 billion in revenue, a 16.6% pre-tax profit margin, and a 22.91% return on equity, suggesting it is well-positioned for future growth and shareholder value. These factors, combined with effective asset management, indicate a favorable outlook for investors.

feed.title: Enova To Buy Grasshopper Bank In $369 Million Deal
feed.summary: Enova International has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Grasshopper Bancorp, including Grasshopper Bank, for approximately $369 million. This acquisition will combine Enova’s online lending capabilities with Grasshopper’s digital banking platform, creating a significantly scaled financial services provider. The deal, expected to close in the second half of 2026, aims to accelerate product expansion, improve financial inclusion, and generate substantial financial benefits for Enova.

feed.title: AI Boom: Bubble Signs, But Opportunities Remain
feed.summary: David Eiswert of T. Rowe Price explores the characteristics of an AI investment bubble, noting rapid capital allocation and market frenzy, but emphasizes that the sector remains in undersupply. He argues that AI is currently generating significant economic surplus and offers a competitive advantage, with manageable risks. The primary concern for a bursting bubble, an oversupply of AI capacity, has not yet materialized; instead, there is a clear undersupply.

feed.title: China 2026: A new cycle emerges
feed.summary: China's equity market outperformed expectations in 2025, driven by policy shifts, new growth drivers, and stabilizing geopolitics. The country is entering a new expansion phase focused on productivity, innovation, and domestic demand, moving away from property-market deleveraging. Key opportunities for investors lie in consumption and services, technology and innovation (including AI and ADAS), and traditional industries benefiting from the "anti-involution" campaign.

feed.title: Mosaic (MOS) gets price target cut as RBC assesses 2026 fertilizer trends
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reduced its price target for Mosaic (MOS) from $45 to $35, maintaining a "Sector Perform" rating. The adjustment reflects RBC's assessment of increasing supply and potentially lower prices in the fertilizer market as it looks ahead to 2026. This outlook includes a forecast for 2026 EBITDA of $2.2 billion for Mosaic.

feed.title: Argus Sees More Upside for HPE, Citing Temporary Server Softness and AI Momentum
feed.summary: Argus upgraded Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) to a Buy rating and increased its price target to $30 from $25, despite a recent revenue miss. The firm believes the weakness in server sales is temporary and expects a rebound in fiscal year 2026, driven by HPE's increasing involvement in the AI market. HPE recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings with significant revenue and cash flow growth, along with new AI initiatives through its partnership with Nvidia.

feed.title: 13 arrested in alleged Home Depot theft ring spanning 9 states, with $2.2M in stolen items
feed.summary: Thirteen people have been arrested in connection with a massive retail theft ring, dubbed "Operation Self Checkout," which targeted 128 Home Depot locations across nine states. The alleged thieves stole over $2.2 million worth of tools and construction equipment, reselling the merchandise online. Prosecutors in Queens, New York, are calling this the largest retail spree they have ever prosecuted in the borough's history.

feed.title: Fifth Third (FITB) Gets Target Lift in Piper Sandler’s Review Ahead of Upcoming Conference
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has raised its price target for Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) to $50 from $48, reiterating an Overweight rating, following the bank's presentation for an upcoming industry conference. The bank also recently entered a new partnership with Brex for commercial cards and expense management, highlighting a trend of banks collaborating with fintech companies. Fifth Third is also in the process of acquiring Comerica, aiming to become the ninth-largest bank in the U.S.

feed.title: eBay Inc.: MJ rookie card auction fetches 48,000 on eBay Live
feed.summary: eBay Inc. recently hosted an eBay Live auction event where an MJ rookie card sold for $48,000, highlighting the platform's engagement with collectors. The event featured collaborations with AJ3 and SoleFly, celebrity guests, and charity auctions. eBay continues to leverage live auctions and exclusive partnerships to expand its market presence and offer unique items to enthusiasts.

feed.title: Wizards of the Coast (NASDAQ: HAS) reveals WARLOCK, a new dark fantasy Dungeons & Dragons game for 2027
feed.summary: Wizards of the Coast, a Hasbro subsidiary, has announced "WARLOCK: DUNGEONS & DRAGONS," a new dark fantasy action-adventure game developed by Invoke Studios. Slated for a 2027 launch, the game features player character Kaatri, portrayed by Tricia Helfer, wielding forbidden magic in an open world. A gameplay reveal is anticipated for summer 2026.

feed.title: Bit Digital’s Financial Ascend: Is It Time to Dive In?
feed.summary: Bit Digital Inc. has reported a significant financial turnaround in Q3, with a 33% revenue jump and a shift from losses to net income, primarily driven by its Ethereum staking activities. Despite a revised price target from analysts due to slower data center growth, the company maintains a "Buy" rating and has seen its digital assets increase substantially. Investors are encouraged to consider Bit Digital's strategic moves, especially in light of evolving cryptocurrency regulations and its strong position in the Ethereum space.

feed.title: Verizon (VZ) Edges Lower in Morgan Stanley’s Target Reset Amid Competitive Priorities
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Benjamin Swinburne reduced the price target for Verizon Communications Inc. (VZ) to $47 from $48, maintaining an Equal Weight rating due to the company's market share defense strategy in a competitive wireless market. Despite industry-leading wireless revenue growth and increased broadband connections in Q3 2025, Verizon faces challenges from high debt and competition. The company continues to reward investors with a consistent quarterly dividend, marking 19 consecutive years of growing dividends.

feed.title: Raymond James boosts financial reach with $692M Bank Midwest partnership, expanding Midwest wealth management operations significantly
feed.summary: Raymond James's Financial Institutions Division (FID) has partnered with Bank Midwest, bringing approximately $692 million in client assets under management to Raymond James and expanding its wealth management services in the Midwest. The 14-person Bank Midwest team will transition and rebrand as Midwest Wealth Group, offering enhanced investment tools, research, and advisory services to Bank Midwest customers. This strategic move strengthens Raymond James's presence in the region and provides Bank Midwest with advanced technological platforms and expertise.

feed.title: Reduced Earnings Outlook Amid Policy Turmoil Could Be A Game Changer For Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM)
feed.summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) recently lowered its full-year earnings guidance due to trade uncertainty with China and unclear biofuel policies, despite exceeding quarterly earnings. This guidance cut highlights the company's sensitivity to external policy and trade conditions, particularly in its global agricultural and biofuels operations. Investors should consider how these external factors reshape ADM’s profitability and investment narrative, although its balance sheet remains strong.

feed.title: Badger Meter announces executive appointments and updates severance agreements
feed.summary: Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE:BMI) has announced several executive appointments and changes to employment agreements, effective January 1, 2026. Robert A. Wrocklage will become EVP – North America Municipal Utility, Daniel R. Weltzien will be promoted to VP – CFO and Treasurer, Kimberly K. Stoll will become VP – Customer Support and General Manager - SmartCover, and Christina M. Tarantino will be VP – Controller. Additionally, the company updated Key Executive Employment Agreements outlining severance benefits in the event of a change-in-control.

feed.title: Jefferies Raises Price Target for Yelp (YELP) to $32, Maintains Hold Rating | YELP Stock News
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Yelp (YELP) to $32 from $31, maintaining a Hold rating, reflecting a 3.23% rise. This adjustment is based on ongoing analyst evaluations of Yelp's business performance and future potential in the digital services market. Wall Street analysts currently forecast an average target price of $33.81 for YELP, implying an upside of 13.07% from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $45.03.

feed.title: Charles Schwab partners with Texas A&M to establish new clinic
feed.summary: Charles Schwab, through its Schwab Advisor Services and Charles Schwab Foundation, has provided a gift to Texas A&M University to establish the Aggie Financial Planning Clinic. This clinic, part of the College of Agriculture and Life Sciences, will offer learning opportunities for students in the Financial Planning Program and expand access to pro-bono financial services.

feed.title: ITC Infotech wins PTC Partner Network Award for FY25 in the PLM Category
feed.summary: ITC Infotech received the PTC Partner Network Award for FY25 in the Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) category, recognizing its strong PLM expertise, commitment to customer value, and strategic collaboration with PTC. The award highlights ITC Infotech's leadership in PLM-led digital transformation and its efforts to help enterprises modernize product development through SaaS-led offerings and intelligent solutions. This global recognition affirms ITC Infotech's deep capabilities and strategic alignment with PTC's vision for an Intelligent Product Lifecycle.

feed.title: NextEra leans into ‘bring your own generation’ as data centers chase reliable power
feed.summary: NextEra Energy is promoting a "bring your own generation" model for large data centers, where customers fund their own power assets while NextEra handles construction and operations. Notably, Google is funding the restart of the Duane Arnold nuclear facility to power a data center, with operations expected by early 2029. NextEra aims to develop 15 gigawatts of generation for data center hubs by 2035, relying heavily on gas-fired generation as a "bridge power" solution alongside renewables and storage.

feed.title: BeLive Holdings Adjourns Annual General Meeting to December 16, 2025
feed.summary: BeLive Holdings (BLIV) has adjourned its Annual General Meeting for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024, to December 16, 2025, to meet notice requirements. The meeting was initially convened on December 11, 2025, in Singapore. The record date for voting remains unchanged, and members can submit or alter proxy votes until December 15, 2025.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Stock Price Up 2.3% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) saw its stock price rise by 2.3% to $317.30 on higher-than-average volume, backed by positive analyst adjustments and strong quarterly earnings. The company reported an EPS of $5.07 against an expected $4.83 and revenue of $47.12 billion, surpassing estimates. Despite some analysts maintaining a "Hold" rating, several firms increased their price targets for JPM.

feed.title: Money20/20 US: Vegas spins the stablecoin story forward
feed.summary: The Money20/20 conference in Las Vegas revealed a significant industry shift towards optimism in fintech, driven by favorable stablecoin regulations and advancements in generative AI. Key themes included the commercialization of stablecoins and agentic AI, with major players and startups showcasing new initiatives and strategic collaborations in payments. The article highlights the convergence of traditional and digital finance, alongside a strong emphasis on trust, security, and payment flexibility through new partnerships and offerings.

feed.title: PG&E Powers Ahead on Breakthrough Grid Innovation with Dynamic Line Rating, Asset Health Monitoring Demonstration
feed.summary: Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) has launched a Dynamic Line Rating (DLR) and Asset Health Monitoring (AHM) technology demonstration to enhance grid reliability and capacity. This initiative involves advanced sensors and real-time analytics to optimize transmission lines and proactively monitor asset health, aiming to integrate more renewable energy and prepare for extreme weather. Collaborating with partners like Heimdall Power, Prisma Photonics, Sentrisense, and Smart Wires, PG&E seeks to modernize California's grid, reduce congestion, and achieve significant cost savings for customers by optimizing existing infrastructure.

feed.title: Keeper links identity security alerts into ServiceNow
feed.summary: Keeper Security has launched an integration with ServiceNow that channels identity and access security alerts from its platform into ServiceNow's IT Service Management and Security Incident Response modules. This integration aims to help security teams, who are facing a rising volume of attacks utilizing stolen or misused credentials, receive high-priority alerts in real time within their existing IT and security operations system. The new functionality supports more consistent incident investigations involving credentials, secrets, and privileged sessions by reducing manual ticket creation and standardizing event flow into the incident queue.
